issues.title: Enemy dealt 10 damage (59% of 17 HP) on floor 2
issues.description: At turn seq 109, floor 2 encounter 2, enemy dealt 10 damage when player had 17 HP. This is 59% of player's HP, exceeding the 50% threshold.

evidence.metric: Enemy dealt 10 damage (59% of player's 17 HP)

issues.suggestedFix: Review enemy damage scaling; consider capping single-hit damage relative to player max HP

issues.title: Player defeated on floor 3
issues.description: average profile was defeated on floor 3 with 67% accuracy. Final encounter against the_curator (boss), dealt 0 but took 12 damage. Early deaths discourage new players.
issues.suggestedFix: Consider reducing early floor difficulty or adding more healing opportunities

issues.title: Max combo stuck at 3 despite 67% accuracy — likely systemic combo cap bug
issues.description: Max combo across entire run is exactly 3 (100 cards played, 67.0% accuracy). All 9 encounters also capped at maxCombo <= 3. With this accuracy, higher combos should be achievable. This appears to be a systemic bug in the combo counting logic.

evidence.metric: maxCombo = 3 with 67.0% accuracy — systemic cap suspected

reproductionSteps: Achieve consecutive correct answers and observe combo counter
issues.suggestedFix: Investigate combo counter logic — appears to be capped at 3 instead of scaling to 5

issues.title: Dead end: Zero damage dealt in F3E2 against the_curator
issues.description: Player dealt 0 damage in floor 3 encounter 2 against the_curator (boss). This means the player could not progress. Cards played: 6, correct: 3, wrong: 3.
issues.suggestedFix: Ensure players always have at least one viable damage option regardless of hand composition
